events.headline: 降灰予報（定時）
sources: 気象庁 地震・火山

members.title: 降灰予報（定時）
members.snippet: 【火山名　桜島　降灰予報（定時）】　現在、桜島は噴火警戒レベル３（入山規制）です。桜島で噴火が発生した場合には、２３日０９時から１２時までは火口から北西方向、２３日２１時から２４時までは火口から北西方向に降灰が予想されます。
members.source: 気象庁 地震・火山

members.source: 気象庁 地震・火山

members.snippet: 22日は三重県と静岡県、それに岐阜県で最高気温が40度以上と、「酷暑日」となりました。23日は東海に加え、京都市や甲府市でも「酷暑日」が予想されています。熱中症で運ばれる人は全国で急増していて、厳重な…

members.title: 愛知 大治町 住宅全焼 焼け跡から2人の遺体 夫婦と連絡取れず
members.snippet: 22日夕方、愛知県大治町で住宅が全焼する火事があり、焼け跡から2人の遺体が見つかりました。この家に住んでいた高齢の夫婦と連絡が取れなくなっていて、警察は遺体の身元の確認を進めています。

members.snippet: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.

events.headline: Police formally investigate woman after Brit stabbed to death in French village

members.title: Police formally investigate woman after Brit stabbed to death in French village
members.snippet: Karen Carter was found with stab wounds in the Dordogne village she had lived in for over a decade.

events.headline: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris

members.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris
members.snippet: Daniel Siad, whose name appears in the Epstein files thousands of times, denied knowledge of the threat Jeffrey Epstein

events.headline: Death toll from blast at Indian hydroelectric project rises to 20 people

members.title: Death toll from blast at Indian hydroelectric project rises to 20 people
members.snippet: Rescuers say flooding and toxic gas in the collapsed tunnel make it unlikely any remaining trapped workers survived.

events.headline: Why the US may stop collecting workplace race and gender data

members.title: Why the US may stop collecting workplace race and gender data
members.snippet: A newly proposed change would eliminate annual workplace demographic reporting used to monitor discrimination trends.

events.headline: US judge sets 2027 trial date for Venezuela’s Maduro and wife

members.title: US judge sets 2027 trial date for Venezuela’s Maduro and wife
members.snippet: Former President Maduro pleads not guilty to drug charges; lawyer plans to challenge legality of US military operation.

events.headline: Anonymous food donations reach Indian student protesters

members.title: Anonymous food donations reach Indian student protesters
members.snippet: Anonymous donors are using food delivery apps to send food to student protesters in New Delhi
